title: Recorded Writing
text: (a) The official record of a writing is not admissible to prove the content of the original writing, except where the original is lost or has been destroyed. (b) This section does not apply to: (1) A recorded writing that is made evidence by statute. (2) A writing which has been recorded, where the original has been delivered as required by law to any public officer. (3) A certified copy of a vital record.
